title: Visually Rich Infographic
sourceTitle: Prompt Create Visually Rich Infographic About Sam

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a visually rich infographic about Sam Altman. Research their era, key achievements, turning points, and lasting impact. Use a dramatic portrait-style central illustration as the focal point, surrounded by annotated timeline segments, quote callouts, and symbolic icons representing their legacy. Style like a bold editorial spread — layered typography, color-blocked sections, and photorealistic portraiture against a dark or textured background. Dense, tactile, and magazine-quality.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

Style like a bold editorial spread — layered typography, color-blocked sections, and photorealistic portraiture against a dark or textured background. Dense, tactile, and magazine-quality.

Style like a bold editorial spread — layered typography, color-blocked sections, and photorealistic portraiture against a dark or textured background. Dense, tactile, and magazine-quality.
originalPrompt: Create a visually rich infographic about Sam Altman. Research their era, key achievements, turning points, and lasting impact. Use a dramatic portrait-style central illustration as the focal point, surrounded by annotated timeline segments, quote callouts, and symbolic icons representing their legacy. Style like a bold editorial spread — layered typography, color-blocked sections, and photorealistic portraiture against a dark or textured background. Dense, tactile, and magazine-quality.

promptTranslations.zh: Sam Altman] 的视觉效果丰富的信息图。研究他们的时代、主要成就、转折点和持久影响。使用引人注目的肖像风格的中心插图作为焦点，周围是带注释的时间线段、引用标注和代表其遗产的象征性图标。风格就像大胆的编辑跨页 — 分层排版、色块部分以及深色或纹理背景下的逼真肖像。致密、触感和杂志品质。
promptTranslations.fr: Créez une infographie visuellement riche sur Sam Altman. Recherchez leur époque, leurs principales réalisations, leurs tournants et leur impact durable. Utilisez une illustration centrale spectaculaire de style portrait comme point central, entourée de segments de chronologie annotés, de légendes de citation et d'icônes symboliques représentant leur héritage. Créez un style éditorial audacieux : typographie en couches, sections aux couleurs contrastées et portraits photoréalistes sur un fond sombre ou texturé. Dense, tactile et de qualité magazine.
promptTranslations.ru:
Используйте английский промпт ниже для генерации изображения; сохраняйте видимый текст, названия брендов, значения переменных и параметры на английском.

Create a visually rich infographic about Sam Altman. Research their era, key achievements, turning points, and lasting impact. Use a dramatic portrait-style central illustration as the focal point, surrounded by annotated timeline segments, quote callouts, and symbolic icons representing their legacy. Style like a bold editorial spread — layered typography, color-blocked sections, and photorealistic portraiture against a dark or textured background. Dense, tactile, and magazine-quality.
promptTranslations.pt: Crie um infográfico visualmente rico sobre Sam Altman. Pesquise sua época, principais conquistas, pontos de virada e impacto duradouro. Use uma ilustração central dramática em estilo retrato como ponto focal, cercada por segmentos anotados da linha do tempo, legendas de citações e ícones simbólicos que representam seu legado. Estilo como uma publicação editorial ousada - tipografia em camadas, seções com cores bloqueadas e retratos fotorrealistas contra um fundo escuro ou texturizado. Denso, tátil e com qualidade de revista.
promptTranslations.ja:
以下の英語画像生成プロンプトを使用してください。表示テキスト、ブランド名、変数値、パラメータは英語のまま保持します。

Create a visually rich infographic about Sam Altman. Research their era, key achievements, turning points, and lasting impact. Use a dramatic portrait-style central illustration as the focal point, surrounded by annotated timeline segments, quote callouts, and symbolic icons representing their legacy. Style like a bold editorial spread — layered typography, color-blocked sections, and photorealistic portraiture against a dark or textured background. Dense, tactile, and magazine-quality.
promptTranslations.ko: Sam Altman]에 대한 시각적으로 풍부한 인포그래픽을 만들어 보세요. 시대, 주요 성과, 전환점, 지속적인 영향을 조사하세요. 주석이 달린 타임라인 세그먼트, 인용문 및 유산을 나타내는 상징적 아이콘으로 둘러싸인 극적인 초상화 스타일의 중앙 일러스트레이션을 초점으로 사용하세요. 대담한 사설 스프레드와 같은 스타일 - 레이어드 타이포그래피, 색상 차단 섹션, 어둡거나 질감이 있는 배경에 대한 사실적인 초상화. 조밀하고 촉감이 좋으며 잡지 품질입니다.
